state.output:
<file>
00001| import React from 'react'
00002| import { PrivyProvider } from '@privy-io/react-auth'
00003| import { WagmiProvider as PrivyWagmiProvider } from '@privy-io/wagmi'
00004| import { WagmiProvider } from 'wagmi'
00005| import { wagmiConfig } from '../blockchain/wagmi'
00006| import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'
00007| import { config } from '../../config'
00008| import { JSONStringifyBigIntHelper } from '../blockchain/bigint'
00009| import { createClient, MAINNET_RELAY_API } from '@relayprotocol/relay-sdk'
00010| 
00011| createClient({ baseApiUrl: MAINNET_RELAY_API })
00012| 
00013| // Create a single query client instance
00014| const queryClient = new QueryClient({
00015|   defaultOptions: {
00016|     queries: {
00017|       retry: (failureCount, error) => {
00018|         // Don't retry on 4xx errors
00019|         if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'status' in error && 
00020|             typeof error.status === 'number' && error.status >= 400 && error.status < 500) {
00021|           return false
00022|         }
00023|         return failureCount < 3
00024|       },
00025|       staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
00026|       refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
00027|       queryKeyHashFn: (key) => {
00028|         return JSON.stringify(key, JSONStringifyBigIntHelper)
00029|       },
00030|     },
00031|   },
00032| })
00033| 
00034| export interface AuthProviderProps {
00035|   children: React.ReactNode
00036| }
00037| 
00038| export const AuthProvider: React.FC<AuthProviderProps> = ({ children }) => {
00039|   // If Privy is not configured, use standard Wagmi with InjectedConnector
00040|   if (!config.privy.appId) {
00041|     return (
00042|       <React.StrictMode>
00043|         <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
00044|           <WagmiProvider config={wagmiConfig}>
00045|             {children}
00046|           </WagmiProvider>
00047|         </QueryClientProvider>
00048|       </React.StrictMode>
00049|     )
00050|   }
00051| 
00052|   // Otherwise use Privy + Wagmi
00053|   return (
00054|     <React.StrictMode>
00055|       <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
00056|         <PrivyProvider appId={config.privy.appId!} clientId={config.privy.clientId!}>
00057|           <PrivyWagmiProvider config={wagmiConfig}>
00058|             {children}
00059|           </PrivyWagmiProvider>
00060|         </PrivyProvider>
00061|       </QueryClientProvider>
00062|     </React.StrictMode>
00063|   )
00064| }
00065| 
00066| // Export query client for use in other parts of the app
00067| export { queryClient } 
</file>
